member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Activities.Activation.BrandMerge.BrandMergeActivity
member.summary: Single writer for brokerage brand files. Calls IBrandMergeService to get the merged Brand Profile and Brand Voice, then writes both to real-estate-star/{accountId}/. This is the ONLY place that reads and writes brand files.

Single writer for brokerage brand files. Calls IBrandMergeService to get the merged Brand Profile and Brand Voice, then writes both to real-estate-star/{accountId}/. This is the ONLY place that reads and writes brand files.
